custom_assertions.message: Employee ID must follow the standard format (E followed by digits).
Employee ID must be unique across all employee records.
Employee Name length must be between 3 and 100 characters.
Email Address must not be null for active employees.
Email Address must belong to an approved company domain.
Phone Number must contain exactly 10 numeric digits.
Department must not be null or blank.
Job Title must not be null or blank.
Hire Date must not be a future date.
Salary must be greater than zero.
Location must not be null or blank.
Employment Status must not be null.
